## Need help in picking the right plan?

Talk to our sales team

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Do you offer a free trial or demo of the platform?

Yes, we offer free trials and personalized demos so you can explore the platform before committing.

### How flexible are the pricing plans? Can they be customized?

Our pricing plans are flexible and can be customized to suit your specific needs, whether you‚Äôre a small team or a large enterprise.

### Is there a setup fee for integrating iMocha with our existing systems?

Integration with your existing systems (ATS, LMS, HRIS) may involve setup fees depending on the complexity of the integration.

### How does pricing change if we scale up or add more users?

Our pricing is scalable, so as your organization grows, you can easily adjust the number of users and assessments to fit your needs.

### What support is included in the pricing plan?

All plans include basic support, but premium support options, such as dedicated account management and 24/7 assistance, may be available at an additional cost.
